content_html:
A family agent for the home — a warm, intelligent presence that listens, understands, remembers, and does. Built on a spare Android phone.

A home should feel like it's looking after you, because it knows you.

teya-demo-compressed.mp4

Prefer reading? The longer write-up: How and why I built a home AI assistant.

a machine that forgets everything

Ask Alexa to set a timer and it works. Ask who's picking the kids up from football, and there's nothing there: no notion of two separate calendars, no memory that this comes up every Tuesday, no way to act on the answer even if it understood the question. Voice assistants were designed in the early 2010s around simple commands — fancy if-then systems. They don't understand context, they forget everything between sessions, and they can't act across apps in any meaningful way. Families use them to set timers and play music, then ignore the rest.

Meanwhile the AI behind ChatGPT and Claude is genuinely intelligent. It sits behind a chat window, though, disconnected from the physical and digital infrastructure of an actual home. Put that same intelligence on a device the whole household shares, instead of one person's chat window, and you get a smart family agent that actually helps run the household: an agent that listens, understands, remembers, and does.

any cheap android phone

The idea that makes this buildable at all: a cheap Android phone is a supercharged Arduino, consumer-ready out of the box. It already has a display, 4G/5G, a mic and speaker, GPS, a calendar and timer, and it can call an AI model directly, on top of the millions of apps already built for it.

Wall-mount any cheap phone, plug it in, and it becomes the single visible node of an invisible home network. Smart bulbs, locks, calendars, messaging apps: all of it hidden infrastructure. The face on the wall is the only interface the family needs to see.

There's no server behind it, no local agent stack. Today's AI-agent wave runs heavy — people buy Mac Minis to host coding agents and orchestration frameworks locally. Teya needs none of it: the intelligence lives in the cloud, reached with a few API calls per turn, so the hardware is a cheap phone that makes those calls, keeps the screen alive, and drives the device. Any modern Android phone, Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer, works.

The mic and speaker weren't built for this, though. They're tuned for close, arm's-reach use, and picking up a wake word or clear speech across a room asks more of them than that. Early testing is encouraging but limited, and a bigger room may need an external mic array or speaker.

install it

No Play Store, no app store review: grab the APK straight from Releases and sideload it.

  1. On the phone, enable "install unknown apps" for your browser (Settings prompts you the first time you try).
  2. Download the latest .apk from the Releases page above.
  3. Tap the downloaded file to install.
  4. Open Teya and follow onboarding — it asks for the household's Mistral API key and the permissions it needs. Wake word tuning and per-person voice enrollment live in Admin (long-press the screen) afterward.

There's no auto-updater — for a new version, come back to Releases, download the new APK, and tap it again. As long as it's signed with the same key, it installs over the existing app without needing an uninstall first (so household data, settings, and memory are kept).

Requirements: any Android phone on 8.0 (Oreo) or newer, a steady internet connection (Mistral runs in the cloud), power (it's meant to stay on), and a Mistral API key — the household pays for its own usage.

what it's for

Right now, that's:

  • Shopping list — "we're out of milk" gets added without being asked twice.
  • Calendar — add an event by voice, recurring or not, and it invites the rest of the household by email automatically.
  • Timers & alarms — set one, and it announces out loud, in its own voice, when time's up.
  • Reminders — "remind me to call the plumber in twenty minutes" or "remind me to bring cupcakes to the school run" becomes a timer or a quiet calendar entry, whichever actually fits.
  • Expenses — "12 euros for fruit" gets logged and categorized on the spot; ask "how much have we spent this month" and it adds the numbers up exactly, never guessing.
  • Calls — "Call Grandma," spoken by a five-year-old who can't navigate a dialer, places a normal, hands-free cellular call, but only to someone on an approved family contacts allowlist: no path to dialing an unknown, arbitrary, or premium number.

The biggest beneficiary is whoever in the house carries the mental load: the appointments, the meals, the logistics, the school admin nobody else tracks. Teya becomes a second brain for the household, running quietly in the background. The fuller list, including what's still ahead, lives in docs/roadmap.md.

It's locked down by design: a boxed home appliance fixed in place, running on fresh accounts created solely to operate it, never the family's personal Google, social, or banking logins. There's nothing personal on it to hijack or steal. Combined with the calling allowlist, that's what makes it safe to leave on a wall within reach of kids and guests.

Privacy works the same way: it's built into the architecture itself. The household roster, per-person memory, and the contacts allowlist live on the device. Raw conversation transcripts stay unwritten, never touching disk. Only what a turn needs to think and speak, or what the nightly dream needs to consolidate memories, goes to the model.

part of the family

You expect a family member to recognize you and remember things about you. That's what Teya does: it remembers, and it recognizes who's talking.

Ask it to remember something, and it will: "remember I'm allergic to peanuts" gets saved as a fact about you specifically, or about the household if it isn't about one person. Ask it to forget, and that memory is gone. Everything it's saved can also be reviewed and edited by hand.

Most of what Teya remembers, though, nobody asked it to save. At the end of every conversation, the model distills what was actually worth keeping into one short note, or decides there's nothing worth keeping at all. Instead of saving a transcript of the conversation, Teya saves that note, so there's never a full record of what was said sitting on the device.

It dreams. Every night, while the house is asleep, those loose notes get consolidated into durable facts about the household, and anything that hasn't been reinforced fades on a forgetting curve instead of piling up forever. It ages the way a person's memory does, keeping what mattered and letting the rest go quiet. Whatever's been kept comes back on its own, without ever being asked to look it up.

It also knows who's talking. Each household member's voice gets enrolled once, and from then on a small on-device model matches who's speaking against those samples, no cloud speaker-ID service involved. A quiet match just tells two people apart; a confident one lets Teya greet someone by name. That runs alongside the wake word and barge-in detection, both on-device too, so most of the listening happens on the phone before anything reaches the cloud.

visualization

The whole screen is the control: a short tap wakes her, same as saying "Hey Teya"; a long press opens Admin.

The phone runs horizontal with the particles visualization, vertical with the face — two eyes and a mouth. Switched in Admin (long-press the screen, or just ask Teya — she knows how, same as any other setting), and the pick carries through onboarding and Admin's own background too. A Claude Code skill (/add-visualization) scaffolds adding a third.

the harness

The agent loop of Teya connects an LLM, TTS, STT, wake word, and VAD models to the phone itself, turning what the model decides into a tool call tied to Android's native SDK: placing a call, adding a shopping-list item, saving a memory.

I wanted onboarding to stay simple, so I stuck to one provider instead of mixing several. It needed to be cheap and multilingual — my own family speaks several languages at home, so Mistral was a very good fit, and it's what runs the reasoning (Mistral Small) plus the speech-to-text and text-to-speech (Voxtral) today. The model itself is swappable, more providers can be added later. Onboarding is where the household enters its own API key.

There's no backend server behind any of this: family data and device control stay local by default, since telephony and the mic/speaker are Android-local APIs a cloud server couldn't reach anyway.

The app is native Kotlin, because it needs deep access to Android's own APIs: reading notifications, acting inside other apps, placing calls, running as an always-on foreground service. Hardware cost and iOS's own lockdown on that kind of background and permission access ruled that platform out. And the app never goes through Play Store or the App Store, so cross-platform's real selling point, one codebase shipped to both stores, was never relevant here.

A call gets placed and then left alone: when a kid says "call Dad," the app dials a normal cellular call and steps aside. It never joins the conversation, and stops managing the call once dialed. A plain cellular call on the SIM: no VoIP, no audio capture, no root.

What actually runs where:

  • On-device (local, no network round-trip): the wake word (a self-trained hey_teya model), barge-in/VAD and echo cancellation for mid-sentence interruption, per-speaker voice ID, the animated on-screen presence, the shopping list, the expense log, and all of family memory, the household roster, aliases, and the contacts allowlist.
  • Cloud, via Mistral: reasoning (the tool-use loop), speech-to-text, and text-to-speech. This is the only mandatory cloud dependency in the system.
  • Phone APIs: telephony (outbound calls), calendar and alarms/timers (shipped), and, still ahead, reading other apps' notifications, acting inside other apps, and smart-home control over BLE/Matter.

None of this needs to be impressive on paper. It needs to work quietly enough that nobody in the house thinks about it.

contributing

This started as a solo build, but the codebase and roadmap are open. If something here interests you — a new tool, a visualization, better wake-word/VAD tuning, a second LLM provider — open an issue to talk it through, or send a PR. docs/roadmap.md has the current status and what's next; the "Adding a tool" and "Adding a visualization" recipes in CLAUDE.md are the fastest way into the codebase.

FAQ

Is it offline? No. Reasoning, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech run through Mistral's cloud API. Everything else — wake word, barge-in, voice ID, memory, the shopping list, the contacts allowlist — stays on the device.

Does it work on iOS? No. Teya needs deep, unsandboxed access to Android's own APIs (telephony, notifications, an always-on foreground service), which iOS doesn't allow.

Can it control smart-home devices yet? Not yet — BLE/Matter control is on the roadmap, see docs/roadmap.md.

Is my voice or what I said stored anywhere? No raw transcript is ever written to disk. Only a short, distilled memory note survives a conversation, consolidated further each night; voice ID matching runs on-device with no cloud speaker-ID service involved.

Documents

  • How and why I built a home AI assistant — the longer write-up: motivation, hardware choice, and the engineering challenges behind it.
  • docs/roadmap.md — status: what's built, verified live, and what's next.
  • LICENSE — Apache-2.0.

sentences.zh: Teya 不需要这些：智能存在于云中，每轮只需几次 API 调用即可实现，因此硬件是一部廉价手机，可以进行这些调用、保持屏幕处于活动状态并驱动设备。

sentences.en: Any modern Android phone, Android 8.0 (Oreo) or newer, works.
sentences.zh: 任何现代 Android 手机（Android 8.0 (Oreo) 或更高版本）都可以使用。

blocks.html_en: The mic and speaker weren't built for this, though. They're tuned for close, arm's-reach use, and picking up a wake word or clear speech across a room asks more of them than that. Early testing is encouraging but limited, and a bigger room may need an external mic array or speaker.

sentences.en: The mic and speaker weren't built for this, though.
sentences.zh: 不过，麦克风和扬声器并不是为此而设计的。

sentences.en: They're tuned for close, arm's-reach use, and picking up a wake word or clear speech across a room asks more of them than that.
sentences.zh: 它们适合近距离、伸手可及的使用，而在房间里听到唤醒词或清晰的讲话对它们的要求远不止这些。

sentences.en: Early testing is encouraging but limited, and a bigger room may need an external mic array or speaker.
sentences.zh: 早期测试令人鼓舞但有限，更大的房间可能需要外部麦克风阵列或扬声器。

blocks.html_en: install it

sentences.en: install it
sentences.zh: 安装它

blocks.html_en: No Play Store, no app store review: grab the APK straight from Releases and sideload it.

sentences.en: No Play Store, no app store review: grab the APK straight from Releases and sideload it.
sentences.zh: 没有 Play 商店，没有应用程序商店审查：直接从发布中获取 APK 并旁加载它。

blocks.html_en: • On the phone, enable "install unknown apps" for your browser (Settings prompts you the first time you try).

sentences.en: On the phone, enable "install unknown apps" for your browser (Settings prompts you the first time you try).
sentences.zh: 在手机上，为浏览器启用“安装未知应用程序”（第一次尝试时“设置”会提示您）。

blocks.html_en: • Download the latest .apk from the Releases page above.

sentences.en: Download the latest .apk from the Releases page above.
sentences.zh: 从上面的发布页面下载最新的 .apk。

blocks.html_en: • Tap the downloaded file to install.

sentences.en: Tap the downloaded file to install.
sentences.zh: 点击下载的文件进行安装。

blocks.html_en: • Open Teya and follow onboarding — it asks for the household's Mistral API key and the permissions it needs. Wake word tuning and per-person voice enrollment live in Admin (long-press the screen) afterward.

sentences.en: Open Teya and follow onboarding — it asks for the household's Mistral API key and the permissions it needs.
sentences.zh: 打开 Teya 并按照入职操作进行操作 — 它要求提供家庭的 Mistral API 密钥及其所需的权限。

sentences.en: Wake word tuning and per-person voice enrollment live in Admin (long-press the screen) afterward.
sentences.zh: 随后，唤醒词调整和每人语音注册将在管理中实时进行（长按屏幕）。

blocks.html_en: There's no auto-updater — for a new version, come back to Releases, download the new APK, and tap it again. As long as it's signed with the same key, it installs over the existing app without needing an uninstall first (so household data, settings, and memory are kept).

sentences.en: There's no auto-updater — for a new version, come back to Releases, download the new APK, and tap it again.
sentences.zh: 没有自动更新程序 - 对于新版本，请返回“发布”，下载新的 APK，然后再次点击它。

sentences.en: As long as it's signed with the same key, it installs over the existing app without needing an uninstall first (so household data, settings, and memory are kept).
sentences.zh: 只要使用相同的密钥签名，它就会安装在现有的应用程序上，而无需先卸载（因此家庭数据、设置和内存都会保留）。

blocks.html_en: Requirements: any Android phone on 8.0 (Oreo) or newer, a steady internet connection (Mistral runs in the cloud), power (it's meant to stay on), and a Mistral API key — the household pays for its own usage.

sentences.en: Requirements: any Android phone on 8.0 (Oreo) or newer, a steady internet connection (Mistral runs in the cloud), power (it's meant to stay on), and a Mistral API key — the household pays for its own usage.
sentences.zh: 要求：任何运行 8.0 (Oreo) 或更高版本的 Android 手机、稳定的互联网连接（Mistral 在云中运行）、电源（意味着保持开启状态）和 Mistral API 密钥 — 家庭为自己的使用付费。

blocks.html_en: what it's for

sentences.en: what it's for
sentences.zh: 这是做什么用的

blocks.html_en: Right now, that's:

sentences.en: Right now, that's:
sentences.zh: 现在，那就是：

blocks.html_en: • Shopping list — "we're out of milk" gets added without being asked twice.

sentences.en: Shopping list — "we're out of milk" gets added without being asked twice.
sentences.zh: 购物清单——“我们没有牛奶了”无需询问两次即可添加。

blocks.html_en: • Calendar — add an event by voice, recurring or not, and it invites the rest of the household by email automatically.

sentences.en: Calendar — add an event by voice, recurring or not, and it invites the rest of the household by email automatically.
sentences.zh: 日历 — 通过语音添加事件（无论是否重复），并自动通过电子邮件邀请其他家庭成员。

blocks.html_en: • Timers & alarms — set one, and it announces out loud, in its own voice, when time's up.

sentences.en: Timers & alarms — set one, and it announces out loud, in its own voice, when time's up.
sentences.zh: 定时器和闹钟——设置一个，它会在时间到时用自己的声音大声宣布。

blocks.html_en: • Reminders — "remind me to call the plumber in twenty minutes" or "remind me to bring cupcakes to the school run" becomes a timer or a quiet calendar entry, whichever actually fits.

sentences.en: Reminders — "remind me to call the plumber in twenty minutes" or "remind me to bring cupcakes to the school run" becomes a timer or a quiet calendar entry, whichever actually fits.
sentences.zh: 提醒——“提醒我二十分钟后打电话给水管工”或“提醒我带纸杯蛋糕去学校跑步”变成一个计时器或一个安静的日历条目，以实际适合的为准。

blocks.html_en: • Expenses — "12 euros for fruit" gets logged and categorized on the spot; ask "how much have we spent this month" and it adds the numbers up exactly, never guessing.

sentences.en: Expenses — "12 euros for fruit" gets logged and categorized on the spot; ask "how much have we spent this month" and it adds the numbers up exactly, never guessing.
sentences.zh: 费用——“12欧元水果”当场记录并分类；问“我们这个月花了多少钱”，它会准确地将数字相加，而不是猜测。

blocks.html_en: • Calls — "Call Grandma," spoken by a five-year-old who can't navigate a dialer, places a normal, hands-free cellular call, but only to someone on an approved family contacts allowlist: no path to dialing an unknown, arbitrary, or premium number.

sentences.en: Calls — "Call Grandma," spoken by a five-year-old who can't navigate a dialer, places a normal, hands-free cellular call, but only to someone on an approved family contacts allowlist: no path to dialing an unknown, arbitrary, or premium number.
sentences.zh: 通话——“给奶奶打电话”，是一个不会使用拨号器的五岁孩子说的，他可以拨打普通的免提手机电话，但只能拨打经过批准的家庭联系人允许名单上的人：无法拨打未知的、任意的或收费的号码。

blocks.html_en: The biggest beneficiary is whoever in the house carries the mental load: the appointments, the meals, the logistics, the school admin nobody else tracks. Teya becomes a second brain for the household, running quietly in the background. The fuller list, including what's still ahead, lives in docs/roadmap.md.

sentences.en: The biggest beneficiary is whoever in the house carries the mental load: the appointments, the meals, the logistics, the school admin nobody else tracks.
sentences.zh: 最大的受益者是家里承担精神负担的人：约会、膳食、后勤、无人追踪的学校管理。

sentences.en: Teya becomes a second brain for the household, running quietly in the background.
sentences.zh: Teya 成为家庭的第二大脑，在后台安静地运行。

sentences.en: The fuller list, including what's still ahead, lives in docs/roadmap.md.
sentences.zh: 更完整的列表（包括未来的内容）位于 docs/roadmap.md 中。

blocks.html_en: It's locked down by design: a boxed home appliance fixed in place, running on fresh accounts created solely to operate it, never the family's personal Google, social, or banking logins. There's nothing personal on it to hijack or steal. Combined with the calling allowlist, that's what makes it safe to leave on a wall within reach of kids and guests.

sentences.en: It's locked down by design: a boxed home appliance fixed in place, running on fresh accounts created solely to operate it, never the family's personal Google, social, or banking logins.
sentences.zh: 它在设计上是锁定的：固定在适当位置的盒装家用电器，在专门为操作它而创建的新帐户上运行，而不是家庭的个人谷歌、社交或银行登录信息。

sentences.en: There's nothing personal on it to hijack or steal.
sentences.zh: 上面没有任何可以劫持或窃取的个人信息。

sentences.en: Combined with the calling allowlist, that's what makes it safe to leave on a wall within reach of kids and guests.
sentences.zh: 与呼叫允许列表相结合，可以安全地将其留在孩子和客人可以接触到的墙上。

blocks.html_en: Privacy works the same way: it's built into the architecture itself. The household roster, per-person memory, and the contacts allowlist live on the device. Raw conversation transcripts stay unwritten, never touching disk. Only what a turn needs to think and speak, or what the nightly dream needs to consolidate memories, goes to the model.

sentences.en: Privacy works the same way: it's built into the architecture itself.
sentences.zh: 隐私的工作方式相同：它内置于架构本身中。

sentences.en: The household roster, per-person memory, and the contacts allowlist live on the device.
sentences.zh: 家庭花名册、每个人的记忆和联系人许可名单都存储在设备上。

sentences.en: Raw conversation transcripts stay unwritten, never touching disk.
sentences.zh: 原始对话记录保持未写入状态，永远不会接触磁盘。

sentences.en: Only what a turn needs to think and speak, or what the nightly dream needs to consolidate memories, goes to the model.
sentences.zh: 只有轮回需要思考和说话的东西，或者夜间梦需要巩固记忆的东西，才会交给模型。

blocks.html_en: part of the family

sentences.en: part of the family
sentences.zh: 家庭的一部分

blocks.html_en: You expect a family member to recognize you and remember things about you. That's what Teya does: it remembers, and it recognizes who's talking.

sentences.en: You expect a family member to recognize you and remember things about you.
sentences.zh: 您希望家人能够认出您并记住有关您的事情。

sentences.en: That's what Teya does: it remembers, and it recognizes who's talking.
sentences.zh: Teya 就是这么做的：它会记住并识别谁在说话。

blocks.html_en: Ask it to remember something, and it will: "remember I'm allergic to peanuts" gets saved as a fact about you specifically, or about the household if it isn't about one person. Ask it to forget, and that memory is gone. Everything it's saved can also be reviewed and edited by hand.

sentences.en: Ask it to remember something, and it will: "remember I'm allergic to peanuts" gets saved as a fact about you specifically, or about the household if it isn't about one person.
sentences.zh: 要求它记住一件事，它会：“记住我对花生过敏”会被保存为一个关于你的事实，或者关于家庭的事实，如果它不是关于一个人的。

sentences.en: Ask it to forget, and that memory is gone.
sentences.zh: 要求它忘记，那么记忆就消失了。

sentences.en: Everything it's saved can also be reviewed and edited by hand.
sentences.zh: 保存的所有内容都可以手动查看和编辑。

blocks.html_en: Most of what Teya remembers, though, nobody asked it to save. At the end of every conversation, the model distills what was actually worth keeping into one short note, or decides there's nothing worth keeping at all. Instead of saving a transcript of the conversation, Teya saves that note, so there's never a full record of what was said sitting on the device.

sentences.en: Most of what Teya remembers, though, nobody asked it to save.
sentences.zh: 不过，泰亚所记得的大部分内容都没有人要求它保存。

sentences.en: At the end of every conversation, the model distills what was actually worth keeping into one short note, or decides there's nothing worth keeping at all.
sentences.zh: 在每次对话结束时，模型都会将实际值得保留的内容提炼成一个简短的笔记，或者决定根本没有什么值得保留的。

sentences.en: Instead of saving a transcript of the conversation, Teya saves that note, so there's never a full record of what was said sitting on the device.
sentences.zh: Teya 没有保存对话记录，而是保存了该便条，因此设备上永远不会有完整的谈话内容记录。

blocks.html_en: It dreams. Every night, while the house is asleep, those loose notes get consolidated into durable facts about the household, and anything that hasn't been reinforced fades on a forgetting curve instead of piling up forever. It ages the way a person's memory does, keeping what mattered and letting the rest go quiet. Whatever's been kept comes back on its own, without ever being asked to look it up.

sentences.en: It dreams.
sentences.zh: 它做梦。

sentences.en: Every night, while the house is asleep, those loose notes get consolidated into durable facts about the household, and anything that hasn't been reinforced fades on a forgetting curve instead of piling up forever.
sentences.zh: 每天晚上，当房子入睡时，那些松散的笔记就会被整合成关于家庭的持久事实，而任何没有被强化的东西都会在遗忘曲线上消失，而不是永远堆积起来。

sentences.en: It ages the way a person's memory does, keeping what mattered and letting the rest go quiet.
sentences.zh: 它就像一个人的记忆一样会老化，保留重要的东西，让其余的安静下来。

sentences.en: Whatever's been kept comes back on its own, without ever being asked to look it up.
sentences.zh: 无论被保留的东西都会自行返回，而无需被要求查找。

blocks.html_en: It also knows who's talking. Each household member's voice gets enrolled once, and from then on a small on-device model matches who's speaking against those samples, no cloud speaker-ID service involved. A quiet match just tells two people apart; a confident one lets Teya greet someone by name. That runs alongside the wake word and barge-in detection, both on-device too, so most of the listening happens on the phone before anything reaches the cloud.

sentences.en: It also knows who's talking.
sentences.zh: 它还知道谁在说话。

sentences.en: Each household member's voice gets enrolled once, and from then on a small on-device model matches who's speaking against those samples, no cloud speaker-ID service involved.
sentences.zh: 每个家庭成员的声音都会被注册一次，从那时起，设备上的一个小型模型就会根据这些样本来匹配谁在说话，不涉及云扬声器 ID 服务。

sentences.en: A quiet match just tells two people apart; a confident one lets Teya greet someone by name.
sentences.zh: 一场安静的比赛只能区分两个人；自信的人会让 Teya 称呼某人的名字。

sentences.en: That runs alongside the wake word and barge-in detection, both on-device too, so most of the listening happens on the phone before anything reaches the cloud.
sentences.zh: 它与唤醒词和插入检测一起运行，两者也在设备上运行，因此大多数监听都在任何内容到达云端之前在手机上进行。

blocks.html_en: visualization

sentences.en: visualization
sentences.zh: 可视化

blocks.html_en: The whole screen is the control: a short tap wakes her, same as saying "Hey Teya"; a long press opens Admin.

sentences.en: The whole screen is the control: a short tap wakes her, same as saying "Hey Teya"; a long press opens Admin.
sentences.zh: 整个屏幕都是控制：短按即可唤醒她，就像说“Hey Teya”一样；长按打开管理员。

blocks.html_en: The phone runs horizontal with the particles visualization, vertical with the face — two eyes and a mouth. Switched in Admin (long-press the screen, or just ask Teya — she knows how, same as any other setting), and the pick carries through onboarding and Admin's own background too. A Claude Code skill (/add-visualization) scaffolds adding a third.

sentences.en: The phone runs horizontal with the particles visualization, vertical with the face — two eyes and a mouth.
sentences.zh: 手机与粒子可视化水平运行，与脸部垂直运行——两只眼睛和一张嘴。

sentences.en: Switched in Admin (long-press the screen, or just ask Teya — she knows how, same as any other setting), and the pick carries through onboarding and Admin's own background too.
sentences.zh: 在管理员中切换（长按屏幕，或者只是询问 Teya - 她知道如何操作，与任何其他设置相同），并且选择也会通过入职和管理员自己的背景进行。

sentences.en: A Claude Code skill (/add-visualization) scaffolds adding a third.
sentences.zh: 克劳德代码技能（/add-visualization）添加了第三个脚手架。

blocks.html_en: the harness

sentences.en: the harness
sentences.zh: 安全带

blocks.html_en: The agent loop of Teya connects an LLM, TTS, STT, wake word, and VAD models to the phone itself, turning what the model decides into a tool call tied to Android's native SDK: placing a call, adding a shopping-list item, saving a memory.

sentences.en: The agent loop of Teya connects an LLM, TTS, STT, wake word, and VAD models to the phone itself, turning what the model decides into a tool call tied to Android's native SDK: placing a call, adding a shopping-list item, saving a memory.
sentences.zh: Teya 的代理循环将 LLM、TTS、STT、唤醒词和 VAD 模型连接到手机本身，将模型的决定转化为与 Android 原生 SDK 相关的工具调用：拨打电话、添加购物清单项目、节省内存。

blocks.html_en: I wanted onboarding to stay simple, so I stuck to one provider instead of mixing several. It needed to be cheap and multilingual — my own family speaks several languages at home, so Mistral was a very good fit, and it's what runs the reasoning (Mistral Small) plus the speech-to-text and text-to-speech (Voxtral) today. The model itself is swappable, more providers can be added later. Onboarding is where the household enters its own API key.

sentences.en: I wanted onboarding to stay simple, so I stuck to one provider instead of mixing several.
sentences.zh: 我希望入职过程保持简单，所以我坚持使用一个提供商，而不是混合使用多个提供商。

sentences.en: It needed to be cheap and multilingual — my own family speaks several languages at home, so Mistral was a very good fit, and it's what runs the reasoning (Mistral Small) plus the speech-to-text and text-to-speech (Voxtral) today.
sentences.zh: 它需要便宜且多语言——我自己的家人在家里讲多种语言，所以 Mistral 非常适合，它是今天运行推理 (Mistral Small) 以及语音转文本和文本转语音 (Voxtral) 的工具。

sentences.en: The model itself is swappable, more providers can be added later.
sentences.zh: 模型本身是可交换的，以后可以添加更多提供者。

sentences.en: Onboarding is where the household enters its own API key.
sentences.zh: 入职是指家庭输入自己的 API 密钥。

blocks.html_en: There's no backend server behind any of this: family data and device control stay local by default, since telephony and the mic/speaker are Android-local APIs a cloud server couldn't reach anyway.

sentences.en: There's no backend server behind any of this: family data and device control stay local by default, since telephony and the mic/speaker are Android-local APIs a cloud server couldn't reach anyway.
sentences.zh: 这一切背后都没有后端服务器：家庭数据和设备控制默认保留在本地，因为电话和麦克风/扬声器是 Android 本地 API，云服务器无论如何也无法访问。

blocks.html_en: The app is native Kotlin, because it needs deep access to Android's own APIs: reading notifications, acting inside other apps, placing calls, running as an always-on foreground service. Hardware cost and iOS's own lockdown on that kind of background and permission access ruled that platform out. And the app never goes through Play Store or the App Store, so cross-platform's real selling point, one codebase shipped to both stores, was never relevant here.

sentences.en: The app is native Kotlin, because it needs deep access to Android's own APIs: reading notifications, acting inside other apps, placing calls, running as an always-on foreground service.
sentences.zh: 该应用程序是原生 Kotlin，因为它需要深入访问 Android 自己的 API：读取通知、在其他应用程序中执行操作、发出调用、作为始终在线的前台服务运行。

sentences.en: Hardware cost and iOS's own lockdown on that kind of background and permission access ruled that platform out.
sentences.zh: 硬件成本和 iOS 自身对此类后台和权限访问的锁定排除了该平台的可能性。

sentences.en: And the app never goes through Play Store or the App Store, so cross-platform's real selling point, one codebase shipped to both stores, was never relevant here.
sentences.zh: 而且该应用程序从未经过 Play Store 或 App Store，因此跨平台的真正卖点（一个代码库运送到两个商店）在这里从来不相关。

blocks.html_en: A call gets placed and then left alone: when a kid says "call Dad," the app dials a normal cellular call and steps aside. It never joins the conversation, and stops managing the call once dialed. A plain cellular call on the SIM: no VoIP, no audio capture, no root.

sentences.en: A call gets placed and then left alone: when a kid says "call Dad," the app dials a normal cellular call and steps aside.
sentences.zh: 拨打电话后就不再理睬：当孩子说“给爸爸打电话”时，应用程序会拨打普通的手机电话，然后退到一边。

sentences.en: It never joins the conversation, and stops managing the call once dialed.
sentences.zh: 它永远不会加入对话，并且在拨打后停止管理呼叫。

sentences.en: A plain cellular call on the SIM: no VoIP, no audio capture, no root.
sentences.zh: SIM 卡上的普通蜂窝电话：无 VoIP、无音频捕获、无 root。

blocks.html_en: What actually runs where:

sentences.en: What actually runs where:
sentences.zh: 实际运行的地方：

blocks.html_en: • On-device (local, no network round-trip): the wake word (a self-trained hey_teya model), barge-in/VAD and echo cancellation for mid-sentence interruption, per-speaker voice ID, the animated on-screen presence, the shopping list, the expense log, and all of family memory, the household roster, aliases, and the contacts allowlist.

sentences.en: On-device (local, no network round-trip): the wake word (a self-trained hey_teya model), barge-in/VAD and echo cancellation for mid-sentence interruption, per-speaker voice ID, the animated on-screen presence, the shopping list, the expense log, and all of family memory, the household roster, aliases, and the contacts allowlist.
sentences.zh: 设备上（本地，无网络往返）：唤醒词（自训练的 hey_teya 模型）、插入/VAD 和用于中间句子中断的回声消除、每个说话者的语音 ID、动画屏幕显示、购物清单、费用日志以及所有家庭记忆、家庭花名册、别名和联系人白名单。

blocks.html_en: • Cloud, via Mistral: reasoning (the tool-use loop), speech-to-text, and text-to-speech. This is the only mandatory cloud dependency in the system.

sentences.en: Cloud, via Mistral: reasoning (the tool-use loop), speech-to-text, and text-to-speech.

content_html_zh:
家庭的家庭代理人——一个温暖、聪明的存在，能够倾听、理解、记忆和行动。 基于备用 Android 手机构建。 家应该让人感觉它在照顾你，因为它了解你。
teya-demo-compressed.mp4

喜欢阅读？ 较长的文章：我如何以及为何构建家庭人工智能助手。

一台忘记一切的机器

让 Alexa 设置一个计时器，它就可以工作。 问谁在足球场接孩子们，那里什么也没有：没有两个独立日历的概念，没有每周二都会出现的记忆，即使它理解了这个问题，也没有办法对答案采取行动。 语音助手是在 2010 年代初围绕简单命令设计的——奇特的 if-then 系统。 他们不理解上下文，忘记会话之间的所有内容，并且无法以任何有意义的方式跨应用程序进行操作。 家庭用它们来设置计时器和播放音乐，然后忽略其余的。

与此同时，ChatGPT 和 Claude 背后的人工智能是真正智能的。 不过，它位于聊天窗口后面，与实际家庭的物理和数字基础设施断开连接。 将同样的智能放在整个家庭共享的设备上，而不是一个人的聊天窗口上，你就会得到一个真正帮助管理家庭的智能家庭代理：一个能够倾听、理解、记忆和执行的代理。

任何便宜的安卓手机

使其完全可构建的想法是：廉价的 Android 手机是一个增压的 Arduino，开箱即用，可供消费者使用。 它已经拥有显示屏、4G/5G、麦克风和扬声器、GPS、日历和计时器，并且可以在已经为其构建的数百万个应用程序之上直接调用人工智能模型。

将任何廉价电话安装在墙上，插入电源，它就成为隐形家庭网络的单个可见节点。 智能灯泡、锁、日历、消息应用程序：所有这些都是隐藏的基础设施。 墙上的脸是家人需要看到的唯一界面。

它背后没有服务器，没有本地代理堆栈。 如今，人工智能代理浪潮席卷而来——人们购买 Mac Mini 来在本地托管编码代理和编排框架。 Teya 不需要这些：智能存在于云中，每轮只需几次 API 调用即可实现，因此硬件是一部廉价手机，可以进行这些调用、保持屏幕处于活动状态并驱动设备。 任何现代 Android 手机（Android 8.0 (Oreo) 或更高版本）都可以使用。

不过，麦克风和扬声器并不是为此而设计的。 它们适合近距离、伸手可及的使用，而在房间里听到唤醒词或清晰的讲话对它们的要求远不止这些。 早期测试令人鼓舞但有限，更大的房间可能需要外部麦克风阵列或扬声器。

安装它

没有 Play 商店，没有应用程序商店审查：直接从发布中获取 APK 并旁加载它。

  1. 在手机上，为浏览器启用“安装未知应用程序”（第一次尝试时“设置”会提示您）。
  2. 从上面的发布页面下载最新的 .apk。
  3. 点击下载的文件进行安装。
  4. 打开 Teya 并按照入职操作进行操作 — 它要求提供家庭的 Mistral API 密钥及其所需的权限。 随后，唤醒词调整和每人语音注册将在管理中实时进行（长按屏幕）。

没有自动更新程序 - 对于新版本，请返回“发布”，下载新的 APK，然后再次点击它。 只要使用相同的密钥签名，它就会安装在现有的应用程序上，而无需先卸载（因此家庭数据、设置和内存都会保留）。

要求：任何运行 8.0 (Oreo) 或更高版本的 Android 手机、稳定的互联网连接（Mistral 在云中运行）、电源（意味着保持开启状态）和 Mistral API 密钥 — 家庭为自己的使用付费。

这是做什么用的

现在，那就是：

  • 购物清单——“我们没有牛奶了”无需询问两次即可添加。
  • 日历 — 通过语音添加事件（无论是否重复），并自动通过电子邮件邀请其他家庭成员。
  • 定时器和闹钟——设置一个，它会在时间到时用自己的声音大声宣布。
  • 提醒——“提醒我二十分钟后打电话给水管工”或“提醒我带纸杯蛋糕去学校跑步”变成一个计时器或一个安静的日历条目，以实际适合的为准。
  • 费用——“12欧元水果”当场记录并分类；问“我们这个月花了多少钱”，它会准确地将数字相加，而不是猜测。
  • 通话——“给奶奶打电话”，是一个不会使用拨号器的五岁孩子说的，他可以拨打普通的免提手机电话，但只能拨打经过批准的家庭联系人允许名单上的人：无法拨打未知的、任意的或收费的号码。

最大的受益者是家里承担精神负担的人：约会、膳食、后勤、无人追踪的学校管理。 Teya 成为家庭的第二大脑，在后台安静地运行。 更完整的列表（包括未来的内容）位于 docs/roadmap.md 中。

它在设计上是锁定的：固定在适当位置的盒装家用电器，在专门为操作它而创建的新帐户上运行，而不是家庭的个人谷歌、社交或银行登录信息。 上面没有任何可以劫持或窃取的个人信息。 与呼叫允许列表相结合，可以安全地将其留在孩子和客人可以接触到的墙上。

隐私的工作方式相同：它内置于架构本身中。 家庭花名册、每个人的记忆和联系人许可名单都存储在设备上。 原始对话记录保持未写入状态，永远不会接触磁盘。 只有轮回需要思考和说话的东西，或者夜间梦需要巩固记忆的东西，才会交给模型。

家庭的一部分

您希望家人能够认出您并记住有关您的事情。 Teya 就是这么做的：它会记住并识别谁在说话。

要求它记住一件事，它会：“记住我对花生过敏”会被保存为一个关于你的事实，或者关于家庭的事实，如果它不是关于一个人的。 要求它忘记，那么记忆就消失了。 保存的所有内容都可以手动查看和编辑。

不过，泰亚所记得的大部分内容都没有人要求它保存。 在每次对话结束时，模型都会将实际值得保留的内容提炼成一个简短的笔记，或者决定根本没有什么值得保留的。 Teya 没有保存对话记录，而是保存了该便条，因此设备上永远不会有完整的谈话内容记录。

它做梦。 每天晚上，当房子入睡时，那些松散的笔记就会被整合成关于家庭的持久事实，而任何没有被强化的东西都会在遗忘曲线上消失，而不是永远堆积起来。 它就像一个人的记忆一样会老化，保留重要的东西，让其余的安静下来。 无论被保留的东西都会自行返回，而无需被要求查找。

它还知道谁在说话。 每个家庭成员的声音都会被注册一次，从那时起，设备上的一个小型模型就会根据这些样本来匹配谁在说话，不涉及云扬声器 ID 服务。 一场安静的比赛只能区分两个人；自信的人会让 Teya 称呼某人的名字。 它与唤醒词和插入检测一起运行，两者也在设备上运行，因此大多数监听都在任何内容到达云端之前在手机上进行。

可视化

整个屏幕都是控制：短按即可唤醒她，就像说“Hey Teya”一样；长按打开管理员。

手机与粒子可视化水平运行，与脸部垂直运行——两只眼睛和一张嘴。 在管理员中切换（长按屏幕，或者只是询问 Teya - 她知道如何操作，与任何其他设置相同），并且选择也会通过入职和管理员自己的背景进行。 克劳德代码技能（/add-visualization）添加了第三个脚手架。

安全带

Teya 的代理循环将 LLM、TTS、STT、唤醒词和 VAD 模型连接到手机本身，将模型的决定转化为与 Android 原生 SDK 相关的工具调用：拨打电话、添加购物清单项目、节省内存。

我希望入职过程保持简单，所以我坚持使用一个提供商，而不是混合使用多个提供商。 它需要便宜且多语言——我自己的家人在家里讲多种语言，所以 Mistral 非常适合，它是今天运行推理 (Mistral Small) 以及语音转文本和文本转语音 (Voxtral) 的工具。 模型本身是可交换的，以后可以添加更多提供者。 入职是指家庭输入自己的 API 密钥。

这一切背后都没有后端服务器：家庭数据和设备控制默认保留在本地，因为电话和麦克风/扬声器是 Android 本地 API，云服务器无论如何也无法访问。

该应用程序是原生 Kotlin，因为它需要深入访问 Android 自己的 API：读取通知、在其他应用程序中执行操作、发出调用、作为始终在线的前台服务运行。 硬件成本和 iOS 自身对此类后台和权限访问的锁定排除了该平台的可能性。 而且该应用程序从未经过 Play Store 或 App Store，因此跨平台的真正卖点（一个代码库运送到两个商店）在这里从来不相关。

拨打电话后就不再理睬：当孩子说“给爸爸打电话”时，应用程序会拨打普通的手机电话，然后退到一边。 它永远不会加入对话，并且在拨打后停止管理呼叫。 SIM 卡上的普通蜂窝电话：无 VoIP、无音频捕获、无 root。

实际运行的地方：

  • 设备上（本地，无网络往返）：唤醒词（自训练的 hey_teya 模型）、插入/VAD 和用于中间句子中断的回声消除、每个说话者的语音 ID、动画屏幕显示、购物清单、费用日志以及所有家庭记忆、家庭花名册、别名和联系人白名单。
  • 云，通过 Mistral：推理（工具使用循环）、语音到文本和文本到语音。 这是系统中唯一强制性的云依赖项。
  • 电话 API：电话（拨出电话）、日历和闹钟/定时器（已发货），以及读取其他应用程序的通知、在其他应用程序内执行操作以及通过 BLE/Matter 进行智能家居控制。

这些都不需要在纸面上令人印象深刻。 它需要足够安静地工作，以便家里没有人会想到它。

贡献

这是一个单独的构建，但代码库和路线图是开放的。 如果您对这里的某些内容感兴趣——新工具、可视化、更好的唤醒词/VAD 调整、第二个 LLM 提供商——提出一个问题来讨论它，或发送 PR。 docs/roadmap.md 有当前状态和下一步； CLAUDE.md 中的“添加工具”和“添加可视化”配方是进入代码库的最快方式。

FAQ

离线了吗？ 不会。推理、语音转文本和文本转语音通过 Mistral 的云 API 运行。 其他一切——唤醒词、打断、语音 ID、内存、购物清单、联系人白名单——都保留在设备上。

它可以在 iOS 上运行吗？ 不可以。Teya 需要对 Android 自己的 API（电话、通知、永远在线的前台服务）进行深度、非沙盒访问，而 iOS 不允许这样做。

它可以控制智能家居设备吗？ 还没有 — BLE/Matter 控制已在路线图上，请参阅 docs/roadmap.md。

我的声音或我说的话是否存储在任何地方？ 没有原始记录被写入磁盘。 谈话中只剩下一段简短的、经过提炼的记忆笔记，每天晚上都会进一步巩固；语音 ID 匹配在设备上运行，不涉及云扬声器 ID 服务。
